use_for: designing software around explicit data-oriented pipelines
treating architecture and optimization as one pipeline-first system design path
structuring stages, data flow, invalidation, and execution order for predictable runtime cost
avoiding whole-system recomputation through explicit stage boundaries and selective refresh
building change-driven incremental rerun paths with explicit fallback to full recompute
coalescing bursts of local updates before incremental rerun
defining explicit fallback from local reruns to structural rebuild
defining stable input and output contracts between stages
adapting data-oriented runtime concepts to constrained hosted runtimes
designing domain-specific pipelines from input snapshots to analysis, published state, and commands
separating domain command production from external mutation application
